name: tish-floem
description: Floem UI host for Tish native JSX (standalone repo; not part of tish workspace)

scripts.build:hello-floem: cargo run --manifest-path ../tish/Cargo.toml -q -p tishlang -- compile --target native --native-backend rust examples/hello-floem/src/main.tish -o examples/hello-floem/dist/hello-floem
scripts.build:kitchen-sink: cargo run --manifest-path ../tish/Cargo.toml -q -p tishlang -- compile --target native --native-backend rust examples/kitchen-sink/src/main.tish -o examples/kitchen-sink/dist/kitchen-sink
